turns.assistant_text:
The AI-related job listings have been successfully sent to you via Telegram. Here’s a summary of the jobs:

1. **[Specialist, Multimedia & Generative AI Production](https://www.indeed.com/viewjob?jk=bb4751e6009b4b71)**  
   **Company:** SHRM  
   **Location:** Alexandria, US  
   **Summary:** Key member of the SHRM Multimedia team, responsible for creating better workplaces.

2. **[Sr. AI Engineer, Special Programs](https://spacecrew.com/space-jobs/mpgkxmxs-spacex-sr-ai-engineer-special-programs)**  
   **Company:** SpaceX  
   **Location:** Washington, US  
   **Summary:** Focus on engineering and deploying AI capabilities for U.S. federal agencies.

3. **[AI Engineer](https://bebee.com/us/jobs/ai-engineer-general-dynamics-falls-church--lifeworq-83774cab-723f-4c1f-a105-1c23f9e1aa9f)**  
   **Company:** General Dynamics  
   **Location:** Falls Church, US  
   **Summary:** Responsibilities include data science and engineering with a focus on AI.

4. **[Software Engineer 2 - (AI Infrastructure, AWS, Kubernetes)](https://www.linkedin.com/jobs/view/software-engineer-2-ai-infrastructure-aws-kubernetes-at-akina-inc-4419837230)**  
   **Company:** Akina, Inc  
   **Location:** Annapolis Junction, US  
   **Summary:** Building the next generation of AI infrastructure.

5. **[Mission AI Campaign Staff Officer](https://bebee.com/us/jobs/mission-ai-campaign-staff-officer-us-office-of-the-director-of-national-intelligence-mclean-va--theirstack-661157510)**  
   **Company:** US Office of the Director of National Intelligence  
   **Location:** McLean, US  
   **Summary:** Ensures the IC is best postured for future threats through strategy and policy development.

items.title: Specialist, Multimedia & Generative AI Production
items.summary:
SHRM is a member-driven catalyst for creating better workplaces where people and businesses thrive together. As the trusted authority on all things work, SHRM is the foremost expert, researcher, advocate, and thought leader on issues and innovations impacting today’s evolving workplaces. With nearly 340,000 members in 180 countries, SHRM touches the lives of more than 362 million workers and their families globally.

The Specialist is a key member of the SHRM Multimedia team, responsibl

items.title: Sr. AI Engineer, Special Programs
items.summary:
SpaceX was founded under the belief that a future where humanity is out exploring the stars is fundamentally more exciting than one where we are not. Today SpaceX is actively developing the technologies to make this possible, with the ultimate goal of enabling human life on Mars.

items.title: Mission AI Campaign Staff Officer
items.company: US Office of the Director of National Intelligence
items.source: US Office of the Director of National Intelligence
items.summary:
Summary

The Policy & Capabilities (PC) Directorate ensures the IC is best postured for the threats and challenges of an uncertain future, through strategy, policy, and capabilities development. PC is comprised of the Strategic Capabilities Office (SCO) and Policy Strategy and Accountability (PSA) Office.
Learn more about this agency
This job is open to

The public

U.S. Citizens, Nationals or those who owe allegiance to the U.S.
Clarification from the agency

Open to current and former Federal

   Mô tả: Hỗ trợ quản lý chương trình cho F-35 JPO.

items.title: Program Manager (Data Visualization), F-35 JPO - Crystal City, Arlington, VA
items.summary:
Position Description & Qualifications

Serco is excited to continue supporting the F-35 Joint Strike Fighter Program Office (JPO). This contract provides program management support in support of the full acquisition lifecycle of the F-35 program, to include development, production, and sustainment.

Our Program Manager (Data Visualization), located in Crystal City, Arlington, VA, provides program management support to the F-35 JPO, Directorate of Acquisition and Affordability (DA&A) in managing

items.title: Sr. F-35 Analyst
items.summary:
Position Description & Qualifications

Position Description & Qualifications

If you love high profile and challenging projects supporting the US Navy- Serco has a great HYBRID opportunity for you! As a Senior F-35 Analyst, you will be supporting the Chief of Naval Operations (OPNAV) Air Warfare Division (N98) through all phases of Naval Aviation F-35 resource management. This position is located in Arlington, VA (Pentatgon).

This position is contingent upon your ability to transfer/maintain yo

items.title: Aircraft Maintenance Supervisor - F-35 Program (DFC)
items.summary:
Description:We are Lockheed Martin

Our products play an important role in the national security of the United States and more than 70 other countries, ensuring peace and stability around the world. Highly trained and specialized personnel and facilities are key to the companys unrivaled success in the aeronautics industry. Our workforce of more than 30,000 has pre-eminent expertise in advanced aircraft design and production, modification and support, stealth technology and systems integration.

items.title: F-35 JPO COMSEC Engineer - Functional Lead with Security Clearance
items.summary:
Join General Dynamics IT and be a part of the team of men and women that solve some of the world's most complex technical challenges. We are seeking a COMSEC Engineer - Functional Lead to join the F-35 JPO program in Arlington, VA. This is a proposal effort with award expected late-2026.

We are interviewing and making offers in preparation so if this timeline works for you, please apply today! The F-35 Joint Program Office (JPO) supports development, acquisition, fielding, modernization, and su

items.title: Responsable departement Industrie (H/F)
items.summary:
Description de l'entreprise

Let's SOCOTEC !

SOCOTEC est dans le Top 10 des Best Workplaces 2025 en France (categorie >2500 salaries) !

Rejoindre SOCOTEC, c'est rejoindre une communaute d'experts soudes, une entreprise en croissance qui va de l'avant et qui valorise l'humain et le developpement de ses equipes, c'est aussi rejoindre une dynamique collective qui fait la difference sur ses marches : construction, immobilier, infrastructures, industrie, environnement.

Serco is excited to continue supporting the F-35 Joint Strike Fighter Program Office (JPO). This contract provides program management support in support of the full acquisition lifecycle of the F-35 program, to include development, production, and sustainment.

Our Program Manager (Data Visualization), located in Crystal City, Arlington, VA, provides program management support to the F-35 JPO, Directorate of Acquisition and Affordability (DA&A) in managing

Position Description & Qualifications

Position Description & Qualifications

If you love high profile and challenging projects supporting the US Navy- Serco has a great HYBRID opportunity for you! As a Senior F-35 Analyst, you will be supporting the Chief of Naval Operations (OPNAV) Air Warfare Division (N98) through all phases of Naval Aviation F-35 resource management. This position is located in Arlington, VA (Pentatgon).

items.title: Aircraft Maintenance Supervisor - F-35 Program (DFC)
items.summary:
Description:We are Lockheed Martin

Our products play an important role in the national security of the United States and more than 70 other countries, ensuring peace and stability around the world. Highly trained and specialized personnel and facilities are key to the companys unrivaled success in the aeronautics industry. Our workforce of more than 30,000 has pre-eminent expertise in advanced aircraft design and production, modification and support, stealth technology and systems integration.

items.title: F-35 JPO COMSEC Engineer - Functional Lead with Security Clearance
items.summary:
Join General Dynamics IT and be a part of the team of men and women that solve some of the world's most complex technical challenges. We are seeking a COMSEC Engineer - Functional Lead to join the F-35 JPO program in Arlington, VA. This is a proposal effort with award expected late-2026.

Dưới đây là một số công việc liên quan đến "f=job":

1. **[Program Manager (Data Visualization), F-35 JPO - Crystal City, Arlington, VA](https://careers.serco-na.com/us/en/job/SUPSUAUS32706EXTERNALENUS/Program-Manager-Data-Visualization-F-35-JPO-Crystal-City-Arlington-VA)**  
   Công ty: Serco USA  
   Mô tả: Hỗ trợ quản lý chương trình cho F-35 JPO.

2. **[Sr. F-35 Analyst](https://serco-na.dejobs.org/arlington-va/sr-f-35-analyst/CEFB96A6B6E841FF91D447D6935D1588/job/)**  
   Công ty: Serco  
   Địa điểm: Arlington, VA  
   Mô tả: Hỗ trợ quản lý tài nguyên F-35 cho Hải quân.

3. **[Aircraft Maintenance Supervisor - F-35 Program (DFC)](https://www.jsfirm.com/job/Management-Aircraft-Maintenance-Supervisor---F-35-Program-(DFC)/Patuxent+River-Maryland/jobID_1916795)**  
   Công ty: Lockheed Martin  
   Mô tả: Quản lý bảo trì máy bay cho chương trình F-35.

4. **[F-35 JPO COMSEC Engineer - Functional Lead with Security Clearance](https://bebee.com/us/jobs/f-35-jpo-comsec-engineer-functional-lead-with-security-clearance-general-dynamics-information-techno--oneredce-8340_8891814)**  
   Công ty: General Dynamics Information Technology  
   Địa điểm: Arlington, VA  
   Mô tả: Kỹ sư COMSEC cho chương trình F-35 JPO.

5. **[Responsable departement Industrie (H/F)](https://www.ziprecruiter.com/c/Socotec/Job/Responsable-departement-Industrie-(H-F)/-in-Washington,DC?jid=238ee806fc74d604)**

   Địa điểm: Washington, DC
